env.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
env.reason: Set this or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY so the simulator can construct and run the airline support agent. OpenAI is preferred when both are present.

env.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
env.reason: Set this or OPENAI_API_KEY so the simulator can construct and run the airline support agent. When used, the project selects the built-in Anthropic LiteLLM model.
